content.en:
In the battle platform, Ye Tian and the other party were on both sides.

"Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor!"

Ye Tian's opponent, Bai Yuan Daozu, said his title lightly, and stopped talking nonsense.

He was full of confidence in whether he could defeat Ye Qingtian.

It has been endless years since he broke through to the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, and his strength is high, even in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain, his strength is among the top.

In the battle of the fighting platform, he has already won more than a thousand points!

On the other hand, Ye Tian's cultivation realm has not yet reached the peak of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, and he looks relatively unfamiliar, not the powerful Ten Thousand Things Realm half-step domain ancestors who are ranked high in the Ten Thousand Things Realm in the Battle Realm Tower.

Therefore, Bai Yuan Daozu didn't care about Ye Tian.

He guessed that Ye Tian should have only entered the Battle Realm Tower not long ago.

Therefore, he didn't take Ye Tian in his eyes at all!

"Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor comes from the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm. "

Ye Tian also said lightly.

Hearing Ye Tian's answer, the contempt on Bai Yuan Daozu's face was even worse.

"Hahaha! Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm? It seems that there are already a few people from the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm today, who have been beaten by the people in the depths of our Dark Forbidden Realm. People from this little-known small place from the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm don't know how they managed to sneak into the Battle Realm Tower? People from a small place like you, who can sneak into the Battle Realm Tower, think that they are strong when they enter the realm of all things or even the realm of unity, and dare to challenge the people in the depths of our dark forbidden realm, I have to say that you are really courageous!"

"Still, it's nice to have a few more people like you. Boy, are you here to give me points?"

Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor erupted into a burst of laughter, and many people around the fighting platform also looked at Ye Tian with contempt.

"You talk a lot of nonsense!"

Ye Tian said lightly, his expression was very disapproving.

"Hmph, boy, you dare to speak out! It's really fearless for those who don't know, just like you, I can destroy ten of them with one move!"

Bai Yuan Daozu threatened, not taking Ye Tian in his eyes at all.

"Is it? like you, I can kill ten of them in one move!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Don't be ashamed! Boy, look at how I teach you today! Teach you how to write the word 'death'!"

Bai Yuan Daozu scolded sharply.

"So, when you came to fight the battle platform, you came to fight with your mouth?"

Ye Tian asked rhetorically.

"Boy, you've me off today, and even if you beg me now, I won't keep you!"

Bai Yuan Daozu looked annoyed, he didn't expect that a person from a little-known small place would dare not put him in his eyes!

Today!

He wants to teach Ye Tian a good lesson!

That's exactly what I'm going to say to you. Today, I will also teach you a lesson, if you are not from a small place, your strength is weaker than you!"

Ye Tian said coldly, even if he was a half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain, he could easily defeat it, after all, his current strength was comparable to that of a half-step domain ancestor of the Unified Realm of the top-level realm!

Once the power of the Extreme Dao is unleashed, it is even more powerful than the Half-Step Domain Ancestor of the Perfection Realm!

Today, I will also teach you a good lesson, you people from such a small place as the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm are not worthy of being the opponent of our Half-Step Domain Ancestor in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Realm!"

Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor said contemptuously.

At the same time as his words fell, he directly transported all of his cultivation to perform the Water System Forbidden Dao Technique! He didn't even use the defensive Forbidden Dao Technique! He was confident that he would be able to kill Ye Tian with one move!

He didn't pay attention to Ye Tian's attack at all! He was confident that with his own body, he would be able to counteract Ye Tian's attack!

After all, he was known for his strong physical body in Quyang City, which was deep in the dark and forbidden depths!

In a blink of an eye.

The Douzhan Arena was filled with the power brought by the Water System Forbidden Dao Technique! The stretching waters occupied the entire Douzhan Arena! Every inch of the water area was filled with great power! It seemed that Ye Tian could be devoured at any time!

The power of this forbidden Dao technique is quite good, it is Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor's famous forbidden Dao technique, the domain of the water god, which can not only suppress the opponent, but also attack the opponent.

"Slash!"

With Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor's order, countless water silk threads carried the momentum of destroying the heavens and the earth, and immediately rushed towards Ye Tian!

At the moment when Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor attacked!

Ye Tian also moved!

"Dark Pole Spear!"

Ye Tian snorted coldly, and also cast the Forbidden Dao Technique Dark Extreme Dao Spear!

For a half-step domain ancestor of the same level, Ye Tian didn't bother to use the power of the Extreme Dao to kill him at all!

Thundered!!!

After Ye Tian launched the Dark Extreme Dao Spear, a Heaven Slaying Spear directly appeared in his hand!

As soon as this sky-killing spear came out, the entire fighting platform was shaken!

"Slash!"

As Ye Tian's words fell, the Heaven Killing Spear slashed forward.

Bang!!!!

Space shock, this blow actually faintly shook the space in the Battle Boundary Tower, what a terrifying power!

Puff puff!!!

Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor's countless forbidden water silk threads collapsed in an instant, and the domain of the Forbidden Dao Water God was also broken!

And when Ye Tian sacrificed the Heaven Killing Spear, Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor immediately sensed that something was wrong.

Ye Tian's strength is not as low-level as he thinks he thinks at all!

On the contrary, it made him feel like he was facing a half-step domain ancestor at the top level of the Unified Realm!

How can it be!

Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor couldn't believe that such a small realm as the Xuanxu Ancient Realm could give birth to such a powerful half-step domain ancestor as Ye Tian!

Present!

Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor regretted it! He shouldn't have taken the enemy so lightly! Even if he used his whole body cultivation to cast a defensive forbidden dao technique!

The Forbidden Dao Technique Tiangang Battle Armor is generated with one thought!

The Battle Tower cannot wear forbidden defensive weapons, except for an attack forbidden weapon or a half-domain weapon, other weapons and treasures cannot be used, so it can only be resisted by the forbidden defensive dao technique.

When the defensive forbidden Dao technique was successfully formed in front of him, Ye Tian's attack also arrived in front of him!

"Bang!!"

A loud bang exploded in front of Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor! The Defensive Forbidden Dao Technique Tiangang Battle Armor was directly slashed by the Heaven Slaying Spear!

In an instant, the Heaven Slaying Spear slashed the body of Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor!

Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor has always been known for his physical strength in the Dark Forbidden Quyang City, so you can see how powerful his physical body is!

However, all of this is simply vulnerable in front of the Sky Slaying Spear!

Rumble!!!!

The Heaven Slaying Spear directly slashed into Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor's flesh, directly tearing Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor's body to pieces!

One move to win or lose!

It's just one move!Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor was killed by Ye Tian!
